title: Villagers-Follow-Emeralds-Fabric
description: Villagers will follow you when holding Emerald blocks/ore
body:
# Villagers-Follow-Emeralds-Fabric This is a simple fabric mod that will make villagers follow you when you are holding Emerald blocks, Emerald ore or Deepslate Emerald ore in your hand
[Video of the mod in action](https://youtu.be/s_QiqLbjWY0)
Report bugs/ make suggestions at the Github page
